name: license-plate-recognizer
description: Read license plates from authorized vehicle images and return structured recognition data.

interface.shortDescription: Read license plates from authorized vehicle images.
interface.longDescription: Use this plugin when a user asks to read a license plate, extract plate text, run LPR or ALPR, or return plate text with confidence and bounding box from an authorized vehicle image.
defaultPrompt: Use License Plate Recognizer to read the license plate from this authorized vehicle image and return JSON.
Use License Plate Recognizer to run LPR on this image URL and show the bounding box.
